description: Super Catálogo de escenas. Usar con workflow_supercatalog.json. Cada escena transforma a la modelo de la imagen de entrada a una nueva pose, outfit y escenario manteniendo su identidad facial.
usage: Cargar imagen original, seleccionar escena, reemplazar SCENE_PROMPT_HERE con el prompt de la escena.

casual_lifestyle.name: Walking city streets
casual_lifestyle.prompt: The same woman walking down a vibrant city street, mid-stride dynamic pose, wearing ripped boyfriend jeans and a white oversized t-shirt, white sneakers, crossbody bag, hair flowing with movement, same face same eyes same skin, shop windows and pedestrians in background, natural street photography, photorealistic, full body head to toe, 8k

casual_lifestyle.name: Coffee shop
casual_lifestyle.prompt: The same woman sitting at a small round cafe table outdoors, legs crossed, holding a cappuccino cup with both hands, wearing a beige knit sweater and dark skinny jeans, ankle boots, same face same eyes same skin, cozy cafe terrace with plants, morning soft light, photorealistic, full body head to toe, 8k
